overview: The Hardy Boys original series by Franklin W. Dixon

books.title: The Tower Treasure
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: Frank and Joe investigate a daring robbery at the Applegate mansion and must find hidden loot before the wrong person is blamed.

books.title: The House on the Cliff
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: The brothers uncover a dangerous smuggling ring operating out of a mysterious house perched on a treacherous cliff.

books.title: The Secret of the Old Mill
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: Frank and Joe discover a counterfeiting operation cleverly concealed inside an abandoned mill on the edge of town.

books.title: The Missing Chums
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: When two of their close friends vanish without a trace, the Hardy boys race against time to track them down.

books.title: Hunting for Hidden Gold
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: The brothers travel deep into the Montana wilderness to recover stolen gold stashed by a notorious gang of outlaws.

books.title: The Shore Road Mystery
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: A string of car thefts along Shore Road pulls Frank and Joe into a perilous criminal conspiracy.

books.title: The Secret of the Caves
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: Mysterious disappearances near a network of coastal caves lead the Hardy boys to a startling underground discovery.

books.title: The Mystery of Cabin Island
books.author: Franklin W. Dixon
books.description: Stranded on a snowbound island, Frank and Joe must solve a baffling mystery before the bitter cold traps them for good.
